title: polybotrya botryoides
intro: Polybotrya botryoides, also known as the 'globe fern', is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Polybotrya botryoides include its potential to alleviate fever, reduce pain, and act as an antimicrobial agent. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments, including respiratory issues and digestive problems.
